message:
test(fcp-core): adapt capability_verifier_predicate_matrix to fallible constraints_cbor builder

Updates the token construction helper in
crates/fcp-core/tests/capability_verifier_predicate_matrix.rs to use
the fallible CapabilityTokenBuilder::try_constraints_cbor method
instead of the (now-removed) infallible constraints_cbor method.
The new call expects the CBOR-encoding step to succeed for
test-fixture constraints, matching the rest of the file's
expect("…")-on-test-construction style.

Single-line behavior-equivalent fix that keeps the test compiling
against the current fcp-crypto builder surface; no logic, no
assertion changes, no production code touched.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
